series_metadata.series_description: Under Ohio law, such as ORC 503.52 and 715.55, the Ohio Attorney General's Office will provide legal guidance and assistance upon request to develop resolution and/or local ordinances regarding the operation of adult entertainment establishments. Records include, but are not limited to, internal and external correspondence related to the submission.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: providing advice and/or draft resolution. ; Paper: providing advice and/or draft resolution. Dispose immediately if scanned and saved electronically
